title: Keybinds Plus
description: A small mod that allows you to configure keybinds for common actions
body:
A simple and lightweight Fabric mod that allows you to bind keys to common actions, such as auto jump, FOV and brightness modification, etc.

 

The mod currently allows you to assign keybinds to the following actions:

 

**Control Settings**
- Toggle Auto Jump
 

**Audio Settings**
- Toggle Subtitles
- Toggle Weather Sounds
 

**Video Settings**
- Decrease/Increase Brightness
- Decrease/Increase FOV
- Toggle View Bobbing
 

**Skin Settings**
- Toggle Cape
- Toggle Hat
- Toggle Jacket
- Toggle Left Pants Leg
- Toggle Left Sleeve
- Toggle Right Pants Leg
- Toggle Right Sleeve
 

The keybinds are unassigned by default and work just like all the other keybinds in the game - simply open the keybind settings menu and configure them!

 

### Issues & Feedback

Have an issue with the mod? Got some feedback? Or do you simply want to be updated on my mods? [Join my Discord server!](https://discord.gg/WtdP245E8Q)
